---
title: "Teaching Data Science - Best practices from the literature"
description: |
  Literature review of teaching best practices in data science
author:
  - name: Shilpa Gupta, Ph.D.
    url: {https://rpubs.com/guptashilpa/964846}
date: 2023-01-04
draft: TRUE
output:
  distill::distill_article:
    self_contained: false
---

## What is Data Science?

Make the case that we can borrow from statistics pedagogy

##
